sections.title: Flammable Combustible Liquids Inspection Checklist
sections.html:
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Inspection Checklist

Inspection frequency note: Refer to applicable OSHA/WISHA requirements for inspection frequency.

Item #

Inspection Item

Pass

Fail

N/A

Corrective Action Required

1

Are flammable liquids stored in approved containers? (per 29 CFR 1926.152(a)(1))

☐

☐

☐

2

Are storage cabinets labeled "FLAMMABLE - KEEP FIRE AWAY"? (per 29 CFR 1926.152(b)(2)(iii))

☐

☐

☐

3

Is the storage area free of weeds, debris, and other combustible materials? (per 29 CFR 1926.152(c)(5))

☐

☐

☐

4

Are "No Smoking" signs posted in storage areas? (per 29 CFR 1926.152(b)(3))

☐

☐

☐

5

Are fire extinguishers readily available near storage areas? (per 29 CFR 1926.152(d)(1))

☐

☐

☐

6

Are containers closed when not in use? (per 29 CFR 1926.152(f)(1))

☐

☐

☐

7

Is dispensing of flammable liquids done in a safe manner? (per 29 CFR 1926.152(e)(2))

☐

☐

☐

8

Are safety cans used for handling flammable liquids? (per 29 CFR 1926.152(a)(1))

☐

☐

☐

9

Are temporary heating devices located away from combustible materials? (per WAC 296-155-280(1))

☐

☐

☐

10

Are temporary heating devices properly ventilated? (per WAC 296-155-280(2))

☐

☐

☐

11

Are fuel lines and connections for heating devices secure and leak-free? (per WAC 296-155-280(3))

☐

☐

☐

12

Are heating devices placed on stable, non-combustible surfaces? (per WAC 296-155-280(4))

☐

☐

☐

13

Is there adequate clearance around heating devices? (per WAC 296-155-280(5))

☐

☐

☐

14

Are employees trained on the safe use of flammable liquids? (per AGC Ch. 8)

☐

☐

☐

15

Are emergency procedures established for spills or fires? (per AGC Ch. 8)

☐

☐

☐
